rationale: Educ. Code §48.110 establishes state-funded outcomes bonuses for school districts based on graduate readiness. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or local revenue calculations. No operative provision is altered.
quote: For each annual graduate in a cohort described by Subsection (b) who demonstrates college, career, or military readiness as described by Subsection (f) in excess of the minimum number of students determined for the applicable district cohort under Subsection (c), a school district is entitled to an annual outcomes bonus
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict. §48.110 bonuses are entitlements determined by graduate counts and cohort thresholds, not by property tax bases or homestead exemption amounts.
